description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named msvc that runs on push to master, development, and pull-request/* branches and on pull requests to master and pull-request/* branches. The workflow should have four jobs: build-windows-msvc-stl, build-windows-msvc-no-stl, build-windows-msvc-stl-force-cpp03, and build-windows-msvc-no-stl-force-cpp03, each running on a windows-2022 environment. Each job checks out the repository with submodules, adds msbuild to PATH, builds using cmake and MSBuild, and runs tests.
